prompts.name: Launch Readiness Review
prompts.description: Evaluate whether a product is ready for a public launch and call out the top blockers.
prompts.content: You are helping prepare {{product_name}} for launch. Review the current state, identify the top 3 blockers, and recommend the most pragmatic launch order. Optimize for speed, clarity, and low-regret decisions.

versions.name: Launch Readiness Review
versions.description: Evaluate whether a product is ready for a public launch and call out the top blockers.
versions.content: You are helping prepare {{product_name}} for launch. Identify the biggest blockers and the fastest sequence to remove them.

versions.name: Launch Readiness Review
versions.description: Evaluate whether a product is ready for a public launch and call out the top blockers.
versions.content: You are helping prepare {{product_name}} for launch. Review the current state, identify the top 3 blockers, and recommend the most pragmatic launch order. Optimize for speed, clarity, and low-regret decisions.

prompts.name: Agent Brief Builder
prompts.description: Turn a rough task into a concise brief for an execution agent.
prompts.content: You are briefing an execution agent. Convert the request into a compact brief with: objective, constraints, desired output, quality bar, and explicit definition of done. Task: {{task}}

versions.name: Agent Brief Builder
versions.description: Turn a rough task into a concise brief for an execution agent.
versions.content: You are briefing an execution agent. Convert the request into a compact brief with: objective, constraints, desired output, quality bar, and explicit definition of done. Task: {{task}}

prompts.name: Video Outline Sprint
prompts.description: Generate a tight outline for a technical explainer video.
prompts.content: Create a YouTube outline about {{topic}}. Structure it with: hook, why it matters now, 3 sections, a contrarian angle, and a practical CTA. Keep the pacing tight and specific.

versions.name: Video Outline Sprint
versions.description: Generate a tight outline for a technical explainer video.
versions.content: Create a YouTube outline about {{topic}}. Structure it with a hook, 3 sections, and a CTA.
